name: cybernetics
curriculum: CYB-001: VSM-to-AI Governance Mapping — structural validity, four gaps (temporal dynamics, recursive depth, non-human S5, missing algedonic channel), requisite variety assessment

CYB-002: Active Dampening for Cross-Repo Oscillation — five control theory mechanisms (negative feedback, hysteresis, deadbands, rate limiting, exponential backoff), open-loop to closed-loop transformation, coordination transparency framework
notes: VSM mapping to Demerzel governance. Stafford Beer's organizational cybernetics.
